channel.title: JSON on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in JSON on simeononsecurity

item.title: Cisco CCNA (200-301): Automation and Programmability
item.category: "Cisco CCNA Course" , "Networking" , "Network Automation" , "Programmability" , "SDN" , "REST APIs" , "Cisco Certification" , "Infrastructure as Code" , "DevNet" , "IT Networking"
item.description: Master automation and programmability for the Cisco CCNA 200-301 exam. Learn how automation impacts networks, controller-based architectures, REST APIs, configuration management, and JSON.

item.title: CompTIA Linux+ (XK0-005): Scripting, Containers, and Automation
item.category: "CompTIA Linux+ Course" , "Shell Scripting" , "Containers" , "Automation" , "DevOps" , "Docker" , "Kubernetes" , "Ansible" , "Infrastructure as Code" , "Linux Certification"
item.description: Master scripting, containers, and automation for the CompTIA Linux+ XK0-005 exam. Learn Bash scripting, regex with grep, sed, and awk, Git, Docker, Podman, Kubernetes, Ansible, and IaC with real examples.
